examples: The elementary sulfur and mercaptan concur in jet fuel and the corrosion level varies as the time.
The second type of the S-mercaptan content in the stable gasoline decides the S-mercaptan content in the refined gasoline.

The gas is mercaptan, added to natural gas to give it a smell.
The smell has been identified as that of mercaptan, the chemical added to natural gas to give it an odour.
